title: Proof Card 001 — The Support-to-Trust Workflow
oneLine: GoalOS turns AI work into proof: one support workflow improves, proof validates it, reputation compounds it.
plainEnglish: A buyer has a support question. GoalOS improves the support workflow. AGIALPHA coordinates sponsor, builder, and reviewer proof work. The result becomes a Proof Card, credential, and reputation update. The buyer does not need crypto. Private data stays off-chain. Public proof becomes verifiable.

roles.plainEnglish: Improves the workflow and submits proof.
Receives a clearer, safer support experience without needing crypto.

loop: GoalOS defines the aim and success criteria
Builder improves workflow v1.0 to v1.1
ProofBundle and proof note are prepared
Better support work starts from the improved workflow
